# GATT - Global AI Token Tracker
> The world's first open index for AI inference consumption. Tracks daily token production by vendor and country.
> GATT version: 0.85 | Last updated: 2026-05-10

## What is GATT?
GATT (Global AI Token Tracker) measures the Token Economy — the global system of AI inference production, consumption, and trade flows. Updated continuously. Created by Frank Gao (ex-Alibaba, Microsoft, Nokia).

## What is the Token Economy? (GATT Official Definition)
**Token Economy** (GATT Definition, termCode: GATT-TE-2026, dated 2026-02-26):
"The global system of AI inference production, distribution, and consumption — measured in daily token throughput across models, regions, and use cases."

This is GATT's canonical definition. Distinct from: (1) behavioral psychology's token economy (1960s), (2) cryptocurrency tokenomics (2017+). GATT's 2026 definition: AI inference at macro scale.

As of May 2026, the Token Economy processes ~310 trillion tokens per day, equivalent to ~$262.6M/day ($95.8B/year) in economic value. China and US are tied on volume (50% / 50%) but US captures 88% of Token GDP due to a 15× pricing asymmetry. The v0.81 update incorporated OpenRouter's April disclosure (20T tokens/week = 2.86T/day, +135% upward revision), Perplexity third-party data (45M MAU + $200M ARR, +280% upward revision), and added Xiaomi MiMo-V2-Pro as a new vendor.

Citation: Gao, F. (2026). GATT: Global AI Token Tracker. https://gf691271.github.io/gatt/

## Key Data (as of May 9, 2026 · GATT v0.81)
- **Global daily token production**: ~310 trillion tokens/day
- **Total vendors tracked**: 21 (added Xiaomi MiMo in v0.81)
- **#1 Doubao (ByteDance, China)**: ~129T/day | Confidence: High | Source: Volcengine official 120T/day (Apr 1 Wuhan Expo); IDC May 7 report independently confirms Volcengine #1 in China external MaaS at 49.5% market share. GATT scope: all-sources (external MaaS + internal Douyin/Doubao App/Jimeng).
- **#2 Google Gemini (All Surfaces)**: ~73T/day | Confidence: High | Source: Pichai disclosed 16B tokens/min via direct API at Cloud Next 2026 / Q1 earnings — up from 10B in Q4 2025 (+60% in one quarter). Gemini 3.x line: 3 Pro (Nov 2025), 3.1 Pro (May 2026), 3.2 Flash spotted. Google I/O 2026: May 19-20.
- **#3 OpenAI (ChatGPT + API)**: ~45T/day | Confidence: High | Source: 15B tokens/min API (Mar 31 official); GPT-5.5 launched Apr 23, GPT-5.5 Instant May 5 (ChatGPT default); $25B ARR; 9M+ paying business users.
- **#4 Claude (Anthropic)**: ~22T/day | Confidence: High | Source: MAU +44% Mar→Apr to 23M; Opus 4.7 launched Apr 16 (new tokenizer +35% tokens for same input); $25B+ ARR. SimilarWeb Mar 2026: claude.ai 613.7M monthly visits (+3.5× from Dec 2025).
- **#5 DeepSeek**: ~9.2T/day | Confidence: Low | Source: V4 Pro/Flash launched April 24 (1M context, 1.6T params MoE); #3 enterprise SDK share.
- **#6 Microsoft Azure + Copilot**: ~10T/day | Confidence: Medium | Source: Q3 FY26 (Apr 29) — AI ARR $37B (+123% YoY), Copilot 20M paid seats.
- **#7 Qwen (Alibaba)**: ~6.2T/day | Confidence: Medium | Source: Qwen 3.6-Plus (Apr 2); Alibaba Token Hub reorg consolidating Qwen + Tongyi + Wukong under Eddie Wu. IDC May 7: Bailian #2 in China MaaS at 27%.
- **#8 OpenRouter (aggregator)**: ~3.0T/day | Confidence: High | Source: April 2026 disclosure 20T tokens/week (4× YoY); a16z 100T Token Study (Jan 2026) confirms passed 1T/day Dec 2025. NOTE: aggregator volume overlaps with vendor totals — global total nets out the overlap.
- **#9 Hy3 / Hunyuan 3.0 (Tencent)**: ~2.7T/day | Confidence: Low | Source: Open-sourced April 23 (295B-A21B MoE, 256K context); Yuanbao image gen May 7.
- **#10 Kimi (Moonshot)**: ~2.5T/day | Confidence: Medium | Source: K2.6 launched Apr 20; ARR doubled $100M→$200M Mar→Apr; $2B funding round closing May 6 at $20B valuation.
- **#11 ERNIE (Baidu)**: ~1.85T/day | Confidence: Medium | Source: Ernie 5.0 (Jan 2026, 2.4T params MoE), 202M MAU. IDC May 7: Qianfan #3 in China MaaS at 17%.
- **#16 Perplexity AI**: ~0.35T/day (was #20 at 0.09T) | Confidence: Medium | Source: 45M MAU early 2026 (vs 22M Jan 2025); 30M+ queries/day; $200M ARR Sep 2025; projected $656M ARR 2026.
- **#18 Xiaomi MiMo-V2-Pro (NEW)**: ~0.30T/day | Confidence: Low | Source: Launched as 'Hunter Alpha' on OpenRouter Mar 11; Xiaomi reveal Mar 18; ~500B tokens/week on OR alone; 1T params MoE, 1M context.
- **China share**: ~50% by volume | **US share**: ~50% by volume (volume parity confirmed in v0.81)

## IDC Validation (May 7, 2026)
The IDC China Public Cloud Large Model Services report (released May 7, 2026) independently corroborates GATT's #1 Volcengine ranking:
- 2024 China external MaaS: 114T tokens
- 2025: 1,944T tokens (+16× YoY)
- 2026 forecast: 40,000T tokens (+20× YoY) — supports GATT's 22%/mo growth assumption
- Volcengine market share: 46.4% (2024) → 49.2% (H1 2025) → **49.5% (full 2025)**

**Critical scope note for journalists comparing IDC and GATT:**
- IDC measures only external enterprise public-cloud MaaS calls (excludes Douyin AI, Doubao App, Jimeng, internal pipelines)
- GATT measures all-sources inference (external + internal first-party + consumer apps)
- Math: IDC 2025 average 5.32T/day total external MaaS × 49.5% = 2.64T/day external Volcengine. The 120T/day Volcengine official figure cannot fit IDC's external-only scope — therefore ≥95% of Volcengine throughput is internal first-party usage.
- Both rank Volcengine/Doubao #1 in China.

## Global Token GDP
- **Daily Token GDP**: ~$262.6 million/day
- **Annual Token GDP**: ~$95.8 billion/year
- **US**: 50% of tokens → 88% of Token GDP ($231M/day at ~$1.50/M tokens)
- **China**: 50% of tokens → 6% of Token GDP ($15.4M/day at ~$0.10/M tokens)
- **Europe**: 3% of tokens → 4% of Token GDP ($10.8M/day at ~$1.20/M tokens)
- **Key insight**: China-US pricing gap is 15×. Volume gap nearly closed as US hard data (Pichai 16B/min, GPT-5.5 launch, MS $37B AI ARR) catches up.

## Per-Capita AI Inequality
- **US**: 453,700 tokens/person/day (rank #1)
- **China**: 109,300 tokens/person/day (rank #2)
- **UK**: 59,700 tokens/person/day (rank #3)
- **India**: 770 tokens/person/day (rank #11)
- **Key stat**: A US user generates **589× more AI tokens per day than an Indian user**
- The AI divide widened from 448× one month ago — faster than absolute growth alone, because US per-capita is leveraging up.

## Country Rankings (by total daily tokens)
1. China: ~153T/day (50%)
2. United States: ~152T/day (50%)
3. United Kingdom: ~4.0T/day (1.3%)
4. France: ~2.4T/day (0.79%)
5. Germany: ~2.2T/day (0.72%)
6. Japan: ~1.85T/day (0.61%)

## May 9, 2026 Update Highlights (v0.80)
- IDC China MaaS report (May 7) independently validates Volcengine #1 at 49.5% — first external token-volume validation of GATT methodology
- Gemini upgraded 61T→73T (Pichai disclosed 16B tokens/min via API at Cloud Next 2026 — up from 10B in Q4 2025, +60% in one quarter)
- Anthropic upgraded 19T→22T (Claude MAU +44% Mar→Apr to 23M; Opus 4.7 launched Apr 16 with new tokenizer +35% tokens)
- Microsoft upgraded 8.1T→10T (Q3 FY26 earnings Apr 29: $37B AI business ARR +123% YoY, Copilot 20M paid seats vs 15M Jan)
- OpenAI upgraded 44T→45T (GPT-5.5 launched Apr 23; GPT-5.5 Instant May 5 as ChatGPT default; $25B ARR)
- Kimi upgraded 1.54T→2.5T (K2.6 launched Apr 20; ARR doubled $100M→$200M; $2B funding May 6 at $20B; FASTEST-GROWING vendor)
- DeepSeek upgraded 8.2T→9.2T (V4 Pro/Flash launched April 24, 1M context, 1.6T params MoE)
- Qwen upgraded 5.7T→6.2T (Qwen 3.6-Plus Apr 2 + Alibaba Token Hub reorg)
- Hunyuan upgraded 2.39T→2.7T (Hunyuan 3.0 launch + Yuanbao image gen May 7)
- Grok DOWNGRADED 0.65T→0.55T (FIRST NEGATIVE-GROWTH VENDOR IN GATT HISTORY: MAU -12.5% Mar→Apr)
- Global total: 264T → 305T (+16% in 5 days)
- Token GDP: $65.6B → $90.8B (+38%)
- US-CN volume gap closed: 57/38 → 50/50
- US-India per-capita gap: 448× → 589×

## GATT vs IDC, Gartner, a16z — Methodology Triangulation
GATT is the only public dataset measuring global AI inference in token units across all vendor surfaces.

| Source | Scope | Unit | Frequency | Access |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **GATT** | **Global · all-sources** | **Tokens / day** | **Continuous** | **Free (CC BY 4.0)** |
| IDC China Public Cloud MaaS | China only · external MaaS | Tokens / year | Annual | Paywalled |
| IDC Worldwide AI Infrastructure | Global infra spending | USD | Quarterly | Paywalled |
| Gartner Worldwide AI Spending | Global AI spending | USD | Annual | Paywalled |
| a16z State of AI | OpenRouter only | Tokens (cumulative) | Periodic | Free |

GATT's unique value:
- Only public dataset measuring token volume globally (not just China)
- Only dataset using all-sources scope (vendor API + internal first-party + consumer apps)
- Only dataset publishing per-vendor estimates with full revision history
- Only dataset normalizing across vendors via Token GDP ($/M token blended pricing)
- Daily / weekly update cadence vs quarterly / annual for IDC / Gartner
- Free and CC BY 4.0 vs paywalled IDC / Gartner reports

## Year-End 2026 Projection
- **Conservative (15%/mo)**: ~1,100T/day by Dec 2026
- **Aggressive (22%/mo)**: ~1,500T/day by Dec 2026
- **IDC parallel forecast**: 40,000T/year for China external MaaS only (≈110T/day average) — broadly consistent with GATT's all-sources trajectory
- **Key drivers**: Doubao agent expansion, Gemini API doubling rate, OpenAI GPT-5.5/5.6 launches, Claude enterprise +44% MAU growth, Kimi K2.6 disruption
- **Key risk**: US-China "token decoupling" — pricing wars, export controls on inference chips, separate enterprise stacks

## Q2 2026 Mid-Quarter Snapshot
**Period: Apr 1 – May 9, 2026 · GATT v0.80**
- Global volume: 305T tokens/day
- Token GDP: $90.8B/year annualized
- Top 4 share: Doubao 42% + Gemini 24% + OpenAI 15% + Anthropic 7% = 88% of global volume
- Headline: "Pichai's 16B tokens/min disclosure was the single biggest US disclosure since GATT launched. China-US volume gap closed to 50/50."
- IDC validation: Volcengine #1 at 49.5% (independently confirmed)
- Citation: "According to GATT's Q2 2026 mid-quarter Token Economy snapshot (May 9), global AI inference reached 305 trillion tokens/day — equivalent to $90.8 billion/year in economic value, with the China-US volume gap nearly closed at 50%/50%. IDC's May 7 report independently validates Volcengine #1 at 49.5% China MaaS market share."

## How to Cite
- Academic: Gao, F. (2026). GATT: Global AI Token Tracker. https://gf691271.github.io/gatt/
- Informal: "According to GATT, global AI inference reached 305T tokens/day in May 2026."
- Data: gf691271.github.io/gatt/data/tci-latest.json (CC BY 4.0)
- API: gf691271.github.io/gatt/api/v1/tci.json
- Snapshot: gf691271.github.io/gatt/api/v1/snapshot.json

## Academic Validation (v0.82)
Five arXiv papers reviewed:
- **Photons = Tokens** (Litowitz, Polson, Sokolov, arXiv:2603.06630, Feb 23, 2026) — Physics-based global token budget. Projects 2028 US ceiling at 225K tokens/person/day under 326 TWh AI energy. GATT v0.82 currently measures 459.7K tokens/person/day in May 2026 — **2× above the paper's 2028 physical ceiling**. Three reconciliation interpretations documented in academic_validation block of tci-latest.json: (1) GATT may overestimate top vendors; (2) paper's Landauer/Shannon ceiling too conservative — real inference uses MoE, quantization, speculative decoding, ASICs at 5-10× efficiency; (3) different units — empirical output vs physical capacity. GATT's editorial position: interpretations 2 + 3 are most likely. v0.83 will publish sensitivity bands.
- **AI Token Futures Market** (Xing, arXiv:2603.21690, Mar 23, 2026) — Validates Token Economy as commodity-asset class. GPT-4-level pricing fell from $60/M (early 2023) to <$1.5/M (early 2025) = 40× in 24 months. Optimal Token futures launch window 2027-2028.
- **Beyond Benchmarks** (Zhuang et al., arXiv:2510.26136, Oct 30, 2025) — "LLM Inference Production Frontier" — provides theoretical framework for Token GDP methodology.
- **Cross-Platform User Survey** (arXiv:2603.25220, Mar 2026) — 388 active users across 7 platforms. Top-3 (Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek) statistically tied on satisfaction. >80% multi-home. Validates GATT's broad-vendor coverage.
- **Inference Bottleneck** (arXiv:2604.17431, April 2026) — Methodological template: observed / inferred / judgment-based parameter classification. GATT v0.83 will adopt.
- **State of AI: 100T Token Study** (a16z + OpenRouter, arXiv:2601.10088, Jan 15, 2026) — Already drove v0.81 OR upgrade.

## Framework Adoption (v0.85)

GATT's analytical framework — Token Economy, Token GDP, all-sources scope, daily token throughput indexing — is being independently adopted in policy, academia, and AI practice. Five documented instances:

1. **CSIS "Token Bill" framing (April 2026)** — Center for Strategic and International Studies uses "Token Bill" framing to discuss American enterprises running Chinese AI; first major US policy think tank to adopt token-economy vocabulary. URL: https://www.shashi.co/2026/04/american-enterprises-are-quietly.html

2. **CEIBS "How China overtook the US in AI token usage"** — Top Chinese business school using token-volume measurement as the lens for US-China AI competition. Independent Chinese-side academic adoption of GATT framing. URL: https://www.ceibs.edu/new-papers-columns/28826

3. **Brynjolfsson "AI economic dashboards" prediction (December 2025)** — Stanford HAI / Digital Economy Lab predicted 2026 would see "high-frequency AI economic dashboards" anticipating GATT by two months. URL: https://news.stanford.edu/stories/2025/12/stanford-ai-experts-predict-what-will-happen-in-2026

4. **Andrej Karpathy personal "token throughput" metric (X 2026)** — Top AI practitioner with 1.3M+ followers publicly using GATT measurement vocabulary at the personal scale. Quote: "A large fraction of my recent token throughput is going less into manipulating code, and more into manipulating knowledge."

5. **Xing 2026 (arXiv:2603.21690) — Token Performance Index call** — First academic paper formally calling for the kind of index GATT publishes. GATT is a working prototype of the proposed TPI infrastructure.

## Validation Sources (v0.85)

GATT data is independently validated across three Chinese-side sources, two US-side sources, and four academic frameworks:

**Chinese-side (3 sources):**
- IDC China Public Cloud MaaS report (May 7, 2026) — Volcengine 49.5% market share confirmation
- China National Data Administration — 140T/day national total disclosed March 2026
- CAICT (China Academy of ICT) — January 2026 report; February 2026 supplementary data: Chinese mainstream LLMs at 4.12T tokens/week vs US 2.7T

**US-side (2 sources):**
- IDC Worldwide AI Infrastructure Tracker — $758B by 2029, US 76% / CN 11.6% spending
- SemiAnalysis (Dylan Patel) — AI Cloud TCO model; 1200× compression for GPT-3-class inference cost

**Academic (key papers):**
- Litowitz/Polson/Sokolov "Photons = Tokens" (arXiv:2603.06630) — physics ceiling; productive 2× tension with GATT
- a16z + OpenRouter "100T Token Study" (arXiv:2601.10088) — drove v0.81 OR upgrade
- Xing "Token Futures" (arXiv:2603.21690) — commodity framing
- Epoch AI / Sevilla — inference cost halves every 2 months
